items.title: East Asia braces for destructive typhoon as landslides kill 15 in Philippines
items.summary: Heading for Taiwan and south-eastern China, the 1,000 km-wide Bavi is forecast to be one of the strongest storms in decades.

items.title: Man fatally shot by ICE in Houston was not intended target, DHS says
items.summary: Immigration agents were looking for a different person when they shot Lorenzo Salgado Araujo during a traffic stop, officials say.

items.title: Man nearly sucked out of window mid-air on Ryanair plane, passengers say
items.summary: The man's wife held onto his legs for around five minutes to stop him from being sucked out, officials say.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 搭機搭到驚悚「吸吸樂」！廉航窗戶脫落 乘客頭肩慘被吸出機外

items.title: 土耳其尋求俄同意轉售S-400防空飛彈 爭取重返美F-35戰機計畫
